Products.name: Rippertuer Special Juice
Products.description:
Contains a magical collection of the rarest fruits gathered from all around the world, like Cherymoya Annona cherimola, Jabuticaba Myrciaria cauliflora, Bael Aegle marmelos... and others, at an unbelievable price!
This item has been made unavailable because of lack of safety standards. (This product is unsafe! We plan to remove it from the stock!)

Products.name: Rippertuer Special Juice
Products.description:
Contains a magical collection of the rarest fruits gathered from all around the world, like Cherymoya Annona cherimola, Jabuticaba Myrciaria cauliflora, Bael Aegle marmelos... and others, at an unbelievable price!
This item has been made unavailable because of lack of safety standards. (This product is unsafe! We plan to remove it from the stock!)

attachments.name: api-call:POST /api/BasketItems/

Products.name: Rippertuer Special Juice
Products.description:
Contains a magical collection of the rarest fruits gathered from all around the world, like Cherymoya Annona cherimola, Jabuticaba Myrciaria cauliflora, Bael Aegle marmelos... and others, at an unbelievable price!
This item has been made unavailable because of lack of safety standards. (This product is unsafe! We plan to remove it from the stock!)

records.title: [TC-UI-1000] Clicking a product opens the detail dialog
records.cleanTitle: Clicking a product opens the detail dialog

steps.title: Wait for selector locator('mat-card div[role="button"][aria-label*="Click for more information"]').first()
Click locator('mat-card div[role="button"][aria-label*="Click for more information"]').first()

records.title: [TC-UI-1001] Logged-in user can submit a review
records.cleanTitle: Logged-in user can submit a review

steps.title: Wait for selector locator('mat-card div[role="button"][aria-label*="Click for more information"]').first()
Click locator('mat-card div[role="button"][aria-label*="Click for more information"]').first()
Click locator('mat-dialog-container #submitButton, mat-dialog-container button[aria-label="Send the review"]').first()

records.title: [TC-UI-1002] Closing the product dialog returns to the catalog
records.cleanTitle: Closing the product dialog returns to the catalog

steps.title: Wait for selector locator('mat-card div[role="button"][aria-label*="Click for more information"]').first()
Click locator('mat-card div[role="button"][aria-label*="Click for more information"]').first()

records.title: [TC-UI-200] User can register with valid data
records.cleanTitle: User can register with valid data

steps.title: Fill "StrongPass!23" getByLabel('Field to confirm the password')
Click getByLabel('Selection list for the security question')
Fill "TestAnswer" getByLabel('Field for the answer to the security question')
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Button to complete the registration' })

records.title: [TC-UI-201] Submit is disabled when required fields are empty
records.cleanTitle: Submit is disabled when required fields are empty

steps.title: Expect "toBeDisabled" getByRole('button', { name: 'Button to complete the registration' })

records.cleanTitle: Repeat password mismatch keeps Register disabled

Fill "TestAnswer" getByLabel('Field for the answer to the security question')
Expect "toBeDisabled" getByRole('button', { name: 'Button to complete the registration' })

records.cleanTitle: Boundary: password length of exactly 5 chars is accepted

steps.title: Fill "abcde" getByLabel('Field to confirm the password')
Click getByLabel('Selection list for the security question')
Fill "TestAnswer" getByLabel('Field for the answer to the security question')
